name: mirai-graph
description: An evolutionary graph operating model for managing the growth of complex systems.

scripts.validate:profiles: node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js profile profiles/software-specification/profile.json && node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js profile profiles/project-management/profile.json && node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js profile profiles/ai-employee/profile.json && node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js profile profiles/skill-runtime/profile.json && node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js profile profiles/implementation-control/profile.json && node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js profile profiles/organization-governance/profile.json
scripts.validate:pilots: node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js seed pilots/independent-implementation-001-conference-planning/graph-seed.json && node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js pilots/independent-implementation-001-conference-planning && node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js seed pilots/independent-implementation-002-software-specification/graph-seed.json && node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js pilots/independent-implementation-002-software-specification && node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js seed pilots/independent-implementation-003-ai-employee-workflow/graph-seed.json && node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js pilots/independent-implementation-003-ai-employee-workflow && node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js seed pilots/independent-implementation-004-research-program/graph-seed.json && node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js pilots/independent-implementation-004-research-program && node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js seed pilots/independent-implementation-005-organization-governance/graph-seed.json && node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js pilots/independent-implementation-005-organization-governance
scripts.validate:context-packs: node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js context-pack benchmarks/synthetic-context-reduction-v0 benchmarks/synthetic-context-reduction-v0/results/context-pack.json && node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js context-pack pilots/independent-implementation-002-software-specification pilots/independent-implementation-002-software-specification/results/context-pack.json
scripts.validate:mirai-graph-compat: node packages/cli/mirai-graph.js validate examples/minimal-graph >/tmp/mirai-graph-compat-primary.json && rg '"valid": true' /tmp/mirai-graph-compat-primary.json && node packages/cli/mirai_graph.js validate examples/minimal-graph >/tmp/mirai-graph-compat-underscore.json && rg '"valid": true' /tmp/mirai-graph-compat-underscore.json && test -f examples/minimal-graph/mirai-graph-package.json && mkdir -p /tmp/mirai-graph-manifest-fixture && cp -R examples/minimal-graph/graph examples/minimal-graph/gates examples/minimal-graph/mirai-graph-package.json /tmp/mirai-graph-manifest-fixture/ && node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js /tmp/mirai-graph-manifest-fixture >/tmp/mirai-graph-compat-manifest.json && rg '"valid": true' /tmp/mirai-graph-compat-manifest.json
scripts.test:negative: node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js examples/invalid-missing-relation-target >/tmp/mirai-graph-negative.out 2>&1 && exit 1 || test $? -eq 1 && node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js examples/invalid-relation-id-mismatch >/tmp/mirai-graph-negative-relation-id.out 2>&1 && exit 1 || test $? -eq 1 && node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js examples/invalid-profile-object-kind >/tmp/mirai-graph-negative-profile-object.out 2>&1 && exit 1 || test $? -eq 1 && node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js examples/invalid-profile-relation-type >/tmp/mirai-graph-negative-profile-relation.out 2>&1 && exit 1 || test $? -eq 1 && node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js context-pack benchmarks/synthetic-context-reduction-v0 examples/invalid-context-pack-missing-explanation/context-pack.json >/tmp/mirai-graph-negative-context-pack.out 2>&1 && exit 1 || test $? -eq 1
scripts.validate:implementation-control-cycles: node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js examples/implementation-control-cycles && node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js implementation-control-cycle examples/implementation-control-cycles/results/implementation-control-cycles.json
scripts.validate:launch-record: node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js examples/launch-record-minimal && node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js launch-record examples/launch-record-minimal/results/launch-record.json
scripts.validate:process-transition: node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js process-transition examples/process-transition-minimal/state-machine.json examples/process-transition-minimal/transition-request.json && node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js process-transition examples/process-transition-minimal/state-machine.json examples/process-transition-minimal/transition-request-skip-kaizen.json
scripts.test:process-transition-negative: node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js process-transition examples/process-transition-minimal/state-machine.json examples/process-transition-minimal/invalid-ready-to-written.json >/tmp/mirai-graph-process-invalid-ready.out 2>&1 && exit 1 || test $? -eq 1 && node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js process-transition examples/process-transition-minimal/state-machine.json examples/process-transition-minimal/invalid-tests-to-approved.json >/tmp/mirai-graph-process-invalid-tests.out 2>&1 && exit 1 || test $? -eq 1 && node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js process-transition examples/process-transition-minimal/state-machine.json examples/process-transition-minimal/invalid-sync-to-update.json >/tmp/mirai-graph-process-invalid-sync.out 2>&1 && exit 1 || test $? -eq 1 && node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js process-transition examples/process-transition-minimal/state-machine.json examples/process-transition-minimal/invalid-release-missing-evidence.json >/tmp/mirai-graph-process-invalid-release.out 2>&1 && exit 1 || test $? -eq 1 && node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js process-transition examples/process-transition-minimal/state-machine.json examples/process-transition-minimal/invalid-terminal-missing-kaizen.json >/tmp/mirai-graph-process-invalid-terminal.out 2>&1 && exit 1 || test $? -eq 1 && node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js process-transition examples/process-transition-minimal/state-machine.json examples/process-transition-minimal/invalid-missing-launch-record.json >/tmp/mirai-graph-process-invalid-launch.out 2>&1 && exit 1 || test $? -eq 1
scripts.validate:process-control: node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js examples/process-control-contract-minimal && node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js process-control-contract examples/process-control-contract-minimal/results/process-control-contract.json
scripts.validate:development-cockpit: node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js examples/instrumentation-layer-minimal && node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js development-cockpit examples/instrumentation-layer-minimal/results/development-cockpit.json
scripts.validate:feature-implementation-traceabi: node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js examples/instrumentation-layer-minimal && node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js feature-implementation-traceability examples/instrumentation-layer-minimal/results/feature-implementation-traceability.json
scripts.validate:multi-source-quality-feedback: node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js examples/instrumentation-layer-minimal && node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js multi-source-quality-feedback examples/instrumentation-layer-minimal/results/multi-source-quality-feedback.json
scripts.validate:instrumentation-layer: npm run validate:development-cockpit && npm run validate:feature-implementation-traceability && npm run validate:multi-source-quality-feedback
scripts.test:technology-quality-feedback-negativ: node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js technology-quality-feedback examples/technology-quality-feedback-minimal/invalid-accepted-with-blocking.json >/tmp/mirai-graph-tqf-invalid-blocking.out 2>&1 && exit 1 || test $? -eq 1 && node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js technology-quality-feedback examples/technology-quality-feedback-minimal/invalid-missing-required-step.json >/tmp/mirai-graph-tqf-invalid-step.out 2>&1 && exit 1 || test $? -eq 1 && node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js technology-quality-feedback examples/technology-quality-feedback-minimal/invalid-process-improvement-without-kaizen.json >/tmp/mirai-graph-tqf-invalid-kaizen.out 2>&1 && exit 1 || test $? -eq 1 && node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js technology-quality-feedback examples/technology-quality-feedback-minimal/invalid-spec-gap-without-route.json >/tmp/mirai-graph-tqf-invalid-spec-gap.out 2>&1 && exit 1 || test $? -eq 1 && node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js technology-quality-feedback examples/technology-quality-feedback-minimal/invalid-unclassified-finding.json >/tmp/mirai-graph-tqf-invalid-classification.out 2>&1 && exit 1 || test $? -eq 1 && node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js technology-quality-feedback examples/technology-quality-feedback-minimal/invalid-evidence-as-authorization.json >/tmp/mirai-graph-tqf-invalid-authorization.out 2>&1 && exit 1 || test $? -eq 1 && node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js technology-quality-feedback examples/technology-quality-feedback-minimal/missing-feedback-report.json >/tmp/mirai-graph-tqf-missing-report.out 2>&1 && exit 1 || test $? -eq 1
scripts.validate:dna-alignment: node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js examples/graph-dna-alignment-minimal && node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js graph-dna-alignment examples/graph-dna-alignment-minimal/results/graph-dna-alignment.json
scripts.validate:work-state: node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js examples/work-recovery-minimal && node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js work-state-machine examples/work-recovery-minimal/results/work-state-machine.json && node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js recovery-resume-record examples/work-recovery-minimal/results/recovery-resume-record.json
scripts.validate:risk-control: node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js examples/risk-and-coordination-minimal && node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js risk-control-matrix examples/risk-and-coordination-minimal/results/risk-control-matrix.json && node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js multi-agent-coordination examples/risk-and-coordination-minimal/results/multi-agent-coordination.json
scripts.validate:source-boundary: node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js examples/source-boundary-minimal && node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js source-boundary-contract examples/source-boundary-minimal/results/source-boundary-contract.json
scripts.validate:templates: node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js templates/software-project-starter && node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js templates/research-program-starter && node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js templates/ai-employee-starter && node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js templates/organization-governance-starter
scripts.validate:cli-unified: node packages/cli/mirai-graph.js validate examples/minimal-graph >/tmp/mirai-graph-cli-validate.json && rg '"valid": true' /tmp/mirai-graph-cli-validate.json && node packages/cli/mirai-graph.js choose-profile >/tmp/mirai-graph-cli-profile.md && rg 'Mirai Graph Profile Selection|organization_governance' /tmp/mirai-graph-cli-profile.md && node packages/cli/mirai-graph.js adopter plan developer >/tmp/mirai-graph-cli-adopter-plan.md && rg 'Mirai Graph Adopter Plan: developer|software-project-starter' /tmp/mirai-graph-cli-adopter-plan.md && node packages/cli/mirai-graph.js adopter report templates/software-project-starter >/tmp/mirai-graph-cli-adopter-report.md && rg 'Mirai Graph Adopter Report|Adoption Checklist' /tmp/mirai-graph-cli-adopter-report.md && node packages/cli/mirai-graph.js report validation examples/minimal-graph >/tmp/mirai-graph-cli-validation.md && rg 'Mirai Graph Validation Report|Valid: `true`' /tmp/mirai-graph-cli-validation.md && node packages/cli/mirai-graph.js explain process-transition examples/process-transition-minimal/state-machine.json examples/process-transition-minimal/transition-request.json >/tmp/mirai-graph-cli-process.md && rg 'Process Transition Decision Report|Valid: `true`' /tmp/mirai-graph-cli-process.md && node packages/cli/mirai-graph.js report technology-quality-feedback examples/technology-quality-feedback-minimal/results/technology-quality-feedback.json >/tmp/mirai-graph-cli-tqf.md && rg 'technology_quality_feedback|Valid: `true`' /tmp/mirai-graph-cli-tqf.md && node packages/cli/mirai-graph.js release state --markdown >/tmp/mirai-graph-cli-release.md && rg 'Mirai Graph Release State|GitHub Release|NPM Package' /tmp/mirai-graph-cli-release.md && node packages/cli/mirai-graph.js report playground >/tmp/mirai-graph-cli-playground.md && rg 'Mirai Graph Playground Demo Report|Baseline Comparison' /tmp/mirai-graph-cli-playground.md
scripts.validate:markdown-report: node packages/cli/validate-mirai-graph.js --markdown examples/minimal-graph >/tmp/mirai-graph-validation-report.md && rg 'Mirai Graph Validation Report|Valid: `true`' /tmp/mirai-graph-validation-report.md
scripts.validate:playground-report: npm run --silent playground:report >/tmp/mirai-graph-playground-report.md && diff -u playground/demo-report.md /tmp/mirai-graph-playground-report.md && rg 'transition explanation|Baseline Comparison|baseline comparison' playground/demo-report.md
scripts.test: npm run validate:minimal && npm run validate:benchmark && npm run validate:seed && npm run validate:profiles && npm run validate:ai-employee && npm run validate:skill-runtime && npm run validate:managed-project && npm run validate:implementation-control && npm run validate:implementation-control-cycles && npm run validate:launch-record && npm run validate:process-transition && npm run validate:process-transition-report && npm run validate:process-control && npm run validate:technology-quality-feedback && npm run validate:instrumentation-layer && npm run validate:dna-alignment && npm run validate:work-state && npm run validate:risk-control && npm run validate:source-boundary && npm run validate:organization-governance && npm run validate:templates && npm run validate:adopter-workflow && npm run validate:release-state && npm run validate:mirai-graph-compat && npm run validate:cli-unified && npm run validate:pilots && npm run validate:context-packs && npm run validate:profile-results && npm run validate:routing-control && npm run seed:preview && npm run context:generate && npm run playground:demo && npm run playground:report && npm run readiness:benchmark && npm run benchmark:synthetic && npm run validate:baseline-comparison && npm run validate:markdown-report && npm run validate:playground-demo && npm run validate:playground-report && npm run test:negative && npm run test:process-transition-negative && npm run test:technology-quality-feedback-negative

author: Rim Zabarov
